---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose an improvement for this downstream repository
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or use case

What need does this address?

## Proposed change

Describe the desired behavior and, if useful, an implementation direction.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternatives have you considered?

## Upstream relationship

Is this specific to this downstream repository, or should it be proposed upstream? Include links or references when known.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, compatibility considerations, or other useful context. Do not include confidential data.
